Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gilad]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Gilad is a Traveler from the free city of Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Gilad has a red symbol on his palm that leaves streaks of light in the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Gilad can summon fire from the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Gilad is a Traveler with bonds to two different Territories.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Gilad is a genius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Gilad's right palm carries his Naraka brand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Gilad can perform a technique that creates an almost-invisible ripple from his hand.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Gilad singlehandedly overpowered the Itasas Tribesmen and a squad of Travelers sent by Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Gilad infiltrated a Damascan outpost in Naraka and opened a Gate to travel back to their world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Gilad can summon a bright orange fireball made of screaming faces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Gilad can perform a Helgard summons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 10''' — Gilad was cut off mid-chant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Gilad is standing behind Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 11''' — Gilad is a character who was lying unconscious on the grass outside Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Gilad is a person who uses a long-handled brand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Gilad is a Traveler.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
